Part.Source:
loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) If &Context.PesCod = 0 Return EndIf
&PesRaz = &Context.PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &FilFan = FilFan Exit EndFor
MB 4 MT 2
Header &titulo = upper('Produtos Vendidos / Comprados no período') print Cabecalho
if &tipoCusto = 'C' print PrintMenuDividido Else Print PrintMenu Endif
End &Primeira_area = 'S' &primeiro_vendedor = 'S' &primeiro_Grupo = 'S' &TotPedQtd = 0 &TotPedVlrItm = 0 &TotPedVlrItmComDsc = 0 &AuxTotPedVlrItmCus = 0 &AuxTotPedVlrItmCusMat = 0 &AuxTotPedVlrItmCusPrd = 0 &auxGrupHie = &GrupHie.Trim() + '.' //##################################################################### For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod, LctAtuEst, ProNom,ProGraNom When &OrdemExibicao = 'N' Order EmpCod,FilCod, LctAtuEst, ProGraRefPadL When &OrdemExibicao = 'C' Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where LctAtuEst = &LctAtuEst Where LctCod = &LctCod when not &LctCod.IsEmpty() Where LctGerFin = &LctGerFin when not &LctGerFin.IsEmpty() Where ProCod = &ProCod when not &ProCod.IsEmpty() Where ProVarNcm = &ProVarNcm when not &ProVarNcm.IsEmpty() Where MarCod = &MarCod when not &MarCod.IsEmpty() Where ProPadForCod = &ProPadForCod when not &ProPadForCod.IsEmpty() Where PedCliCod = &PesCliCod when not &PesCliCod.IsEmpty() Where (PedDtaFat >= &PedDtaEms and PedDtaFat <= &PedDtaEms_Go) when &PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO and &TCon096_HoraProdutoVendido <> Status_simNao.Sim Where (PedDtaFic >= &PedDtaEms and PedDtaFic <= &PedDtaEms_Go) when (&PedSts <> Status_Pedido.FECHADO or &PedSts.IsEmpty()) and &TCon096_HoraProdutoVendido <> Status_simNao.Sim Where (PedHorFat >= &PedHorFat and PedHorFat <= &PedHorFat_Go) When &PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO and &TCon096_HoraProdutoVendido = Status_simNao.Sim Where PedSts = &PedSts when not &PedSts.IsEmpty() Where PedSts <> Status_Pedido.CANCELADO when &PedSts.IsEmpty() Where PedItmVenCod = &PesVenCod when not &PesVenCod.IsEmpty() Where PedVenAreCod = &AreCod when not &AreCod.IsEmpty() Where ProSetCod = &ProSetCod when not &ProSetCod.IsEmpty() Where GrupHie = &GrupHie or GrupHie like &auxGrupHie when not &GrupHie.IsEmpty() where ProTipDef = Definicao.SERVICO when &TipoProduto = 'S' where ProTipDef <> Definicao.SERVICO when &TipoProduto = 'P' Where ProClsPrdCod = &ProClsPrdCod when not &ProClsPrdCod.IsEmpty()
If &Primeira_area = 'S' and &AreCod <> 0 &PedVenAreNom = TRIM(Str(PedVenAreCod))+'-'+TRIM(PedVenAreNom) Print PrintArea &Primeira_area = 'N' Endif
If &primeiro_vendedor = 'S' and &PesVenCod <> 0 &PedVenCodRaz = PedVenCodRaz print PrintVendedor &primeiro_vendedor = 'N' EndIf
If &primeiro_Grupo = 'S' and not &GrupHie.IsEmpty() &GrupCodNom = GrupCodNom print PrintGrupo &primeiro_Grupo = 'N' EndIf
If &ProGraRef <> ProGraRef and &ProGraRef <> '' If &PedQtd > 0 &PedVlrCus = (&PedVlrItmCus/&PedQtd) &PedVlrCusPrd = (&PedVlrItmCusPrd/&PedQtd) &PedVlrCusMat = 0 if &PedVlrCus > &PedVlrCusPrd &PedVlrCusMat = &PedVlrCus - &PedVlrCusPrd Endif
&TotPedQtd += &PedQtd &TotPedVlrItm += &PedVlrItm &TotPedVlrItmComDsc += &PedVlrItmComDsc &AuxTotPedVlrItmCus += &PedVlrItmCus &AuxTotPedVlrItmCusMat += &PedVlrItmCusMat &AuxTotPedVlrItmCusPrd += &PedVlrItmCusPrd
if &tipoCusto = 'C' print ProdutoCustoDividido Else Print Produto Endif If not &aux2ProNom.Trim().IsEmpty() Print ProdutoCpl EndIf Noskip Print Linha
&PedQtd = 0 &PedVlrItm = 0 &PedVlrItmComDsc = 0 &PedVlrCus = 0 &PedVlrCusPrd = 0 &PedVlrCusMat = 0 &PedVlrItmCus = 0 &PedVlrItmCusPrd = 0 &PedVlrItmCusMat = 0 EndIf EndIf
&auxProNom = GxGetMLi(ProNomGra, 1, 45) &aux2ProNom = GxGetMLi(ProNomGra, 2, 45) &ProGraRef = ProGraRef &ProEmbUnd = ProEmbUnd
Do Case Case &QtdTipo = 1//somente Vendidos &PedQtd += PedQtd &PedVlrItm += PedVlrItm &PedVlrItmComDsc += PedVlrItmComDsc &PedVlrItmCus += PedVlrItmCus &PedVlrItmCusPrd += (PedVlrCusPrd * PedQtd)
&CustoMateriaPrima = iif(PedVlrCus > PedVlrCusPrd, (PedVlrCus - PedVlrCusPrd), 0) &PedVlrItmCusMat += (&CustoMateriaPrima * PedQtd)
Case &QtdTipo = 2// Somente Canceladas &PedQtd += PedQtdCan &PedVlrItm += PedVlrItm &PedVlrItmComDsc += PedVlrItmComDsc &PedVlrItmCus += (PedVlrCus *PedQtdCan) &PedVlrItmCusPrd += (PedVlrCusPrd * PedQtdCan)
&CustoMateriaPrima = iif(PedVlrCus > PedVlrCusPrd, (PedVlrCus - PedVlrCusPrd), 0) &PedVlrItmCusMat += (&CustoMateriaPrima * PedQtdCan)
Case &QtdTipo = 3//Vendidas + Canceladas &PedQtd += PedQtd + PedQtdCan &PedVlrItm += PedVlrItm &PedVlrItmComDsc += PedVlrItmComDsc &PedVlrItmCus += (PedVlrItmCus + (PedVlrCus *PedQtdCan)) &PedVlrItmCusPrd += (PedVlrCusPrd * (PedQtd + PedQtdCan))
&CustoMateriaPrima = iif(PedVlrCus > PedVlrCusPrd, (PedVlrCus - PedVlrCusPrd), 0) &PedVlrItmCusMat += (&CustoMateriaPrima * (PedQtd + PedQtdCan)) EndCase EndFor
//################################ FINAL If &PedQtd > 0 &PedVlrCus = (&PedVlrItmCus/&PedQtd) &PedVlrCusPrd = (&PedVlrItmCusPrd/&PedQtd)
&PedVlrCusMat = 0 if &PedVlrCus > &PedVlrCusPrd &PedVlrCusMat = &PedVlrCus - &PedVlrCusPrd Endif
&TotPedQtd += &PedQtd &TotPedVlrItm += &PedVlrItm &TotPedVlrItmComDsc += &PedVlrItmComDsc &AuxTotPedVlrItmCus += &PedVlrItmCus &AuxTotPedVlrItmCusMat += &PedVlrItmCusMat &AuxTotPedVlrItmCusPrd += &PedVlrItmCusPrd
if &tipoCusto = 'C' print ProdutoCustoDividido Else Print Produto Endif If not &aux2ProNom.Trim().IsEmpty() Print ProdutoCpl EndIf Noskip Print Linha
EndIf
//################################
if &TipoCusto = 'C' print TotalDividido Else print Total Endif Do 'printPedidos'
Footer print Rodape End
Sub 'printPedidos' If &ProCod <> 0 and &DetalharItens = True &auxPedQtd = 0 &PedPedCod = 0 print pedidoTitulo For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod, ProCod,LctAtuEst, PedCod, (PedDtaFic) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where LctAtuEst = &LctAtuEst Where LctCod = &LctCod when not &LctCod.IsEmpty() Where LctGerFin = &LctGerFin when not &LctGerFin.IsEmpty() Where ProVarNcm = &ProVarNcm when not &ProVarNcm.IsEmpty() Where MarCod = &MarCod when not &MarCod.IsEmpty() Where ProPadForCod = &ProPadForCod when not &ProPadForCod.IsEmpty() Where PedCliCod = &PesCliCod when not &PesCliCod.IsEmpty() Where (PedDtaFat >= &PedDtaEms and PedDtaFat <= &PedDtaEms_Go) when &PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO and &TCon096_HoraProdutoVendido <> Status_simNao.Sim Where (PedDtaFic >= &PedDtaEms and PedDtaFic <= &PedDtaEms_Go) when (&PedSts <> Status_Pedido.FECHADO or &PedSts.IsEmpty()) and &TCon096_HoraProdutoVendido <> Status_simNao.Sim Where (PedHorFat >= &PedHorFat and PedHorFat <= &PedHorFat_Go) When &PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO and &TCon096_HoraProdutoVendido = Status_simNao.Sim Where PedSts = &PedSts when not &PedSts.IsEmpty() Where PedSts <> Status_Pedido.CANCELADO when &PedSts.IsEmpty() Where PedVenCod = &PesVenCod when not &PesVenCod.IsEmpty() Where PedVenAreCod = &AreCod when not &AreCod.IsEmpty() Where ProSetCod = &ProSetCod when not &ProSetCod.IsEmpty() Where GrupHie = &GrupHie or GrupHie like &auxGrupHie when not &GrupHie.IsEmpty() where ProTipDef = Definicao.SERVICO when &TipoProduto = 'S' where ProTipDef <> Definicao.SERVICO when &TipoProduto = 'P' Where ProClsPrdCod = &ProClsPrdCod when not &ProClsPrdCod.IsEmpty()
If &PedPedCod <> PedCod and &auxPedQtd > 0 print PedidoItens &auxPedQtd = 0 EndIf &PedDtaFat = PedDtaFat &auxPedQtd += PedQtd &PedPedCod = PedCod EndFor print PedidoItens EndIf EndSub

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Respeite o meio ambiente. Evite a impressão desnecessária deste documento!
